package rulefixtures

import (
	"log"
)

// scenario for env_var_in_error_message: `fmt.Errorf("... %s", os.Getenv("SECRET_KEY"))` or similar patterns that embed environment variable values in errors
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
type Rule708NegativeRecord struct { PasswordHash string; TokenID string }

func scenario708Negative(config Rule708NegativeRecord) error {
	log.Printf("credential id=%s", config.TokenID)
	return nil
}
